gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id INNER JOIN votes AS T4 ON T4.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Matt Parker' GROUP BY T2.PostId, T4.Id HAVING COUNT(T4.Id) > 4
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'Matt Parker' AND T1.Id > 4
question: How many posts by Matt Parker have more than 4 votes?
